name.ja: アクツキのブラスデス

requirement.en: During your Main Phase that you Normal or Special Summoned this card, send the top card of your Deck to the Graveyard.

effect.en: Choose 1 face-up non-Maximum Effect Monster with 100 or more ATK on your opponent's field, and this card gains ATK equal to [the chosen monster's ATK] until the end of this turn. Then, until the end of your opponent's next turn, neither player takes battle damage from battles involving this card.
